rules.reason: the shared stylesheet is public; the object self-gates theme changes to admin sessions
the appearance page is public and read-only; switching goes through the admin-gated /style POST
the shared navigation script is public; it only surfaces routes the caller is already permitted to use
the shared markdown renderer is a public static script
the shared schema-driven form generator is a public static script
the shared list generator is a public static script
the shared feature-flag helper is a public static script; it only reads flags the caller's own session is entitled to via /api/flags
the shared slot registry is a public static script like the other generators
